Name.jp: 怪獣・ロックスマッシュ

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>25%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>25%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Petrified</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>석화</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases Defense by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分のターンが来るたびに、防御力が<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n每到自身回合时,使防御力提升<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nReduces one target's <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> when attacking. This effect ignores the target's <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n攻撃時、対象単体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-5%</color>DOWNさせる。対象の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を無視して効果が適用される。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n공격 시 대상 한 명의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-5%</color> 감소시킵니다. 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 무시하고 효과가 적용됩니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n攻击时,使1个目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-5%</color>。该效果无视目标的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>。
